message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame dropna + fillna (3 cases)

Append 3 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame null handling:

- dropna_basic: 4-row 2-col, two rows with at least one null are
  dropped; only rows 0 and 3 survive
- dropna_no_nulls: int+float frame with no nulls — returns frame
  unchanged
- fillna_basic: nulls in both columns replaced with 0.0

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.dropna()/.fillna(0.0) and emits expected_frame), runs the Rust
DataFrame.dropna()/.fillna(&Scalar::Float64(0.0)), and asserts parity
via compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameDropNa / DataFrameFillNa
were already wired through the Frame response branch; this fills the
live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-e5lsj]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
